base_material.standard_designation: The standard designations used to uniquely identify the material based on its distinct characteristics.
base_material.trade_name: The trade names used to uniquely identify the material.
base_material.commercial_grade: The commercial grades used to categorize the material.
base_material.uns_code: The Unified Numbering System (UNS) codes used to uniquely identify the material.
base_material.alloy_family: The broad alloy families used to categorize the material based on its distinct characteristics.
base_material.elemental_weight_percentages: The bulk weight percentages of critical alloying elements in the material.
base_material.elemental_atomic_percentages: The atomic percentages of critical alloying elements in the material.
base_material.spatial_chemical_homogeneity: The spatial chemical homogeneity of the material's elemental makeup.
base_material.trace_impurities: Trace impurities introduced into the material from raw precursor metals.
base_material.derived_theoretical_metrics: Derived theoretical metrics utilized to predict phase balances within the material.
base_material.overall_microstructure: Comprehensive details regarding the overall internal crystalline structure of the material.
base_material.average_grain_dimensions: The average grain dimensions within the material's microstructure.
base_material.crystallographic_phases: Specific crystallographic phases or lattice structures present in the material.
base_material.inclusion_composition: The composition of non-metallic inclusions or boundaries that may act as preferential defect sites.
base_material.inclusion_size: The size of non-metallic inclusions or boundaries.
base_material.inclusion_density: The density of non-metallic inclusions or boundaries.

conditioned_material.material_identification: The unique designation, name, or identification code of the conditioned material or alloy under investigation.
conditioned_material.fabrication_steps: A comprehensive summary of the overall preparation, manufacturing, and fabrication steps applied to the bulk base material.
conditioned_material.welding_operations: Specific welding operations applied to produce the specimen prior to extraction.
conditioned_material.welding_techniques: The specific techniques utilized during welding operations to produce the specimen.
conditioned_material.filler_wire_composition: The composition of the filler wire used to produce the specimen prior to extraction.
conditioned_material.heat_treatments: Standard heat treatments applied to condition the material microstructure.
conditioned_material.cooling_methods: Cooling methods utilized during the thermal conditioning history.
conditioned_material.simulated_transient_thermal_cycles: Simulated transient thermal cycles applied to condition the material microstructure.
conditioned_material.purposeful_sensitization_indicators: Explicit indicators of purposeful sensitization used to induce specific precipitation in the material.
conditioned_material.mechanical_surface_preparation: Mechanical procedures (e.g., grinding, polishing) applied to the specimen prior to testing to standardize surface topography.
conditioned_material.chemical_surface_preparation: Chemical procedures (e.g., etching, passivation) applied prior to testing to stabilize the protective passive film.
conditioned_material.final_surface_roughness: The final roughness characteristics established on the test specimen.
conditioned_material.exposed_surface_area: The explicitly defined geometric surface area of the working electrode actively exposed to the testing electrolyte, utilized to calculate current densities and scale the statistical probability of defect-driven pitting initiation.

experiment.experimental_test_type: The specific test types utilized during the experimental procedure.
experiment.electrochemical_mode: The electrochemical modes applied during the test.
experiment.solution_chemistry_summary: A comprehensive summary of the solution chemistry used in the experiment.
experiment.operating_parameters_summary: A comprehensive overview of the operating parameters applied during the test.
experiment.overarching_environmental_conditions: The overarching environmental conditions under which the experimental procedure was conducted.
experiment.pitting_potential: The measured critical electrochemical potential at which stable, localized pitting initiates and continuously propagates on the material surface.
experiment.electrolyte_temperature: The thermodynamic temperature of the bulk test solution, representing a key variable influencing generalized and localized corrosion susceptibility.
experiment.continuous_sweep_rate: The continuous sweep rate applied to change the electrical potential during potentiodynamic polarization testing.
experiment.discrete_step_size: The discrete step-size applied to change the electrical potential during stepwise polarization testing.
experiment.holding_duration: The holding duration applied at discrete electrical potential steps during stepwise polarization testing.
experiment.reference_electrode: The specific standard electrode (e.g., SCE, Ag/AgCl) utilized to measure, reference, and establish standardized electrical potentials within the electrochemical cell.
experiment.electrolyte_solvents: The solvents utilized in the precise chemical formulation of the testing solution.
experiment.electrolyte_primary_salts: The primary salts utilized in the precise chemical formulation of the testing solution.
experiment.electrolyte_molar_concentrations: The molar concentrations of the constituents within the testing solution.
experiment.electrolyte_soluble_additives: The soluble additives included in the chemical formulation of the testing solution.
experiment.dissolved_gas_condition: The dissolved gas condition within the bulk electrolyte, specifying whether the solution is actively aerated, naturally exposed to air, or deaerated/purged.
experiment.purge_gas_type: The specific inert gas (e.g., nitrogen, argon) used for purging the electrolyte solution.
experiment.corrosion_potential: The steady-state open-circuit resting potential (Ecorr) of the working electrode measured in the test solution prior to any active external polarization.
experiment.ocp_stabilization_methodology: The specific methodology used to establish a steady-state open-circuit equilibrium prior to active electrochemical testing.
experiment.ocp_resting_duration: The specific resting duration used to establish a steady-state open-circuit equilibrium.
experiment.ocp_stability_threshold: The specific stability threshold used to establish a steady-state open-circuit equilibrium.
experiment.counter_electrode_composition: The material composition of the auxiliary electrode utilized to complete the electrochemical circuit.
experiment.counter_electrode_geometry: The physical geometry of the auxiliary electrode.
experiment.counter_electrode_exposed_area: The exposed area of the auxiliary electrode utilized to complete the circuit.
experiment.counter_electrode_isolation_method: The isolation method applied to the auxiliary electrode.
experiment.electrolyte_ph: The explicitly measured, controlled, or actively adjusted hydrogen ion concentration (pH) of the bulk testing electrolyte.
experiment.passive_current_density: The baseline, steady-state anodic current density maintained by the material's protective oxide layer across its passive potential domain prior to localized breakdown.
